title: Equality, Diversity and Inclusion Report 2024 to 2025 — Second Edition
body: "This second edition of our financial year 2024 and 2025 Equality, Diversity and Inclusion Report highlights the progress we’ve made since the launch of our initial financial year 2024 and 2025 report and reaffirms our continued dedication to creating a more inclusive and representative workplace.  Our people remain at the heart of everything we do, and we’re committed to building an Agency that not only reflects the diverse communities we serve, but also champions inclusion in how we shape homes and places across the country.  In this update, we revisit our strategic approach, share new insights from colleagues, and provide updated data on the diversity of our workforce and leadership. We also set out the next steps in our journey and the actions we’re taking to drive meaningful, lasting change. "
